name: AI Ark

auth.notes: API key. Current authentication page requires X-TOKEN header; an older/summary getting-started page mentions Authorization: Bearer, so prefer endpoint/auth reference examples.

rateLimits: Global limit documented as 5 requests/second, 300/minute, and 18,000/hour; exceeded calls return 429 and reset every 60 seconds. Service-specific concurrency is visible in the developer portal and can be customized.
pagination: Documented for result endpoints via page and size parameters; bulk search endpoints document size limits, commonly up to 100 records/request, while export-with-email supports up to 10,000 requested results per export.
notes: Official ReadMe-hosted developer hub includes llms.txt, Markdown pages, endpoint references, webhooks, rate-limit docs, and a remote MCP server URL.
Raw OpenAPI URL was not confirmed during QA; keep openApiSpec unknown until a downloadable spec URL is verified.
